data_storage.label: Save my answers
data_storage.explanation: We securely save your answers and [child]'s profile so you can pick up where you left off and see progress over time.

ai_analysis.label: Use AI to help explain results
ai_analysis.explanation: AI helps write easy-to-read summaries and suggestions from your answers — it never decides anything on its own.

media_capture.label: Record audio, photos, or video
media_capture.explanation: Only if you choose to, for this one activity — you can say no and describe things instead, any time.

professional_sharing.label: Share with a professional
professional_sharing.explanation: We only share your results with a doctor or specialist when you specifically choose to send them.
